description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot armor; Price 2,300 gp; Weight 15 lbs. DESCRIPTION This +1 leather armor is made of a linen-like cloth made of a sea plant and resembles a snug light coat with a tattered lower fringe in the shape of trailing seaweed. The wearer of a sea coat gains a +5 bonus on Swim checks. Once per day, the wearer can breathe water (as the water breathing spell) for 1 minute. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells water breathing; Special creator must have 5 ranks in the Swim skill; Price 1,230 gp
